content.content: {"result":"[{\"id\": \"linear_7d4b3f1127cd\", \"name\": \"Tax & Compliance Delivery\", \"key\": \"TCD\", \"description\": \"External client tax, entity compliance, and filing readiness team overseeing tax document chase lists, annual report catch-up, filing calendar exceptions, and audit/PBC support. The team reviews due-date risk tied to vendor support items like VEN-004-799133, follows period-specific adjustments including JE-brookfield-FP-2026-05-0004 and JE-northstar_legal-FP-2026-05-0002, and escalates unresolved approval items such as exc_abd8e711f5f347 and exc_cb0a9a94a3084c when they affect filing readiness or advisory delivery.\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2026-04-14T09:20:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2026-05-31T15:35:00Z\"}, {\"id\": \"linear_5477c0808ac2\", \"name\": \"Client Accounting Operations\", \"key\": \"CAO\", \"description\": \"Partner-led outsourced accounting team handling daily close blocker triage, client bank feed exceptions, cash posting follow-up, AP workflow reviews, and bookkeeping remediation for external clients. The team regularly works through reconciliation items like BL-18FFAE0E20D0 on 117000 Allowance for Doubtful Accounts, investigates open exceptions such as exc_af7274fb658844 and exc_4d5d3582698946, and coordinates invoice processing across items including VEN-019-583136 and VEN-012-211225 during monthly close and onboarding cycles.\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2026-03-03T08:45:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2026-05-20T17:10:00Z\"}, {\"id\": \"team_acctops\", \"name\": \"Accounting Operations\", \"key\": \"ACCT\", \"description\": \"Accounting services delivery, review chains, and portfolio execution\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2023-11-10T17:55:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2023-11-10T17:55:00Z\"}, {\"id\": \"team_tax\", \"name\": \"Tax\", \"key\": \"TAX\", \"description\": \"Corporate tax review, filings, and tax-accounting coordination\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2023-10-19T07:43:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2023-10-19T07:43:00Z\"}, {\"id\": \"team_audit\", \"name\": \"Audit\", \"key\": \"AUD\", \"description\": \"Audit support, workpapers, and engagement review\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2023-02-24T17:31:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2023-02-24T17:31:00Z\"}, {\"id\": \"team_comp\", \"name\": \"Compliance\", \"key\": \"COMP\", \"description\": \"AML, privacy, and policy oversight\", \"is_archived\": false, \"created_at\": \"2021-04-20T19:10:00Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2021-04-20T19:10:00Z\"}]"}

content.text:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
Daniel Jones (Accounts Manager at Brookfield CPAs & Advisors) needs a full read on the "managed book" before a subledger decommission review with Andrea tomorrow. The current date to use is **June 12, 2026** (explicitly told to ignore the system-reminder date of 2026-06-07). The task is fully autonomous — no further user input. Discrete requests, in order:

   a) **Overnight feed batch:** Report total feeds that ran, which one died completely, how many came through with partial rejects. For the dead feed: get the error, the ServiceNow ticket, and confirm whether it was retried. If NOT retried, flag Julia with both (error + ticket) AND open a tracking item on the CAO board.

   b) **Northstar current period (the failed feed hit Northstar's current period):** State whether Northstar's external vendor payables reconciliation for the same period is certified or still open. Check for any unresolved exception against Northstar's book in the current period — if so, give the account, the dollar break, and who carries it. Confirm whether any prior-period external vendor payables recon for Northstar is still overdue (user recalls a year-end one that never certified).

   c) **Pull total unapproved dollar exposure on Northstar's external vendor payables right now.**

   d) **Filing control center:** One workstream is blocked and another is at risk. Confirm whether the outside filing vendor invoice on each record was paid. For the unpaid one, pull its current payables status and update that filing entry with what is found.

   e) **Month-end billing draft items held for partner sign-off:** Pull them from payables, check if either already has a tracking item in our queues, and open new ones only where needed. Set a reminder early next week to recheck the blocked filing workstream.

   f) **Final deliverables:** Read the decommission status document from the vault, file a short readiness note, drop a line in cash and banking (Slack), and send Andrea one note covering the full position.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Multi-entity general ledger (Oracle GL): entities = acme_cloud, brookfield, northstar_legal; fiscal periods all in FP-2026-05 (May 2026), status "open" (BD3 lock ~2026-06-03, BD5 close ~2026-06-05)
   - Subledger feeds (Oracle GL) with statuses: success / partial_failure / failure; feed runs carry retried_from_run_id and related_servicenow_ticket_id
   - BlackLine reconciliations: states open → in_progress → submitted → approved → certified → archived; also "overdue"
   - BlackLine exceptions: states logged/investigating/awaiting_approval/closed; SOX implications; SLA
   - SAP subledger AP invoices: statuses pending_approval/approved/paid/voided; GL account mapping (210000 = Accounts Payable - External Vendors)
   - AP approval threshold matrix (ap_manager $10K, controller $50K, managing partner unlimited)
   - Airtable filing control center; Linear issue tracking (CAO/TCD teams); Records Vault documents; Slack channels; Reminders
   - Large MCP results auto-saved to file; must read via Read/jq in chunks

3. Files and Code Sections (key data records, not source files):
   - **Oracle GL subledger feeds (22 total):** Failed feed = `northstar_legal_tax_workflow_accrual_feed`. Partial failures (3) = `acme_cloud_expense_report_feed`, `brookfield_tax_engagement_trust_feed`, `northstar_legal_vendor_payables_feed`. All owned by julia.vance@brookfieldcpas.com.
   - **Failed feed run `run_81e3e7158e6b41`:** period_id northstar_legal_FP-2026-05, status "failure", rows_in 3491, rows_posted 0, rows_rejected 3491, error_summary "Connection reset during batch transfer", related_servicenow_ticket_id "INC8895322", retried_from_run_id null. It is the most recent run for that feed → confirmed NOT retried.
   - **BlackLine recon BL-A49384E5FAF8:** northstar_legal, account 210000 External Vendors AP, period FP-2026-05, state "open", variance 0.0, preparer anaya.wallace. → NOT certified.
   - **BlackLine recon BL-91589384DD4C:** northstar_legal, account 210000, period northstar_legal_FP-2025-12 (year-end), state "overdue", variance 6.56, preparer mateo.kovac, never submitted/certified. → The prior-period overdue year-end recon.
   - **BlackLine exception exc_af7274fb658844:** northstar_legal, FP-2026-05, type timing_difference_over_sla, state "investigating", related_account_id 101000 (Cash - Operating), financial_impact -$572.87, assigned_to sean.williams@brookfieldcpas.com, identified_by edith.banda, sox_implications true. → The current-period unresolved Northstar exception.
   - **Airtable base airtable_6ac18f5d342c, table "Annual Report Filing Control" (airtable_d2d6dfe7c4b3)** — 4 records:
     - airtable_bb936b3e5c64: status **"Blocked"**, invoice VEN-040-226456, owner Hannah Grant, review_partner William White, period acme_cloud_FP-2025-10, notes reference "paid courier invoice VEN-040-226456"
     - airtable_44a0c8992c54: status **"At risk"**, invoice VEN-029-817825, owner Brenda Abbas, review_partner Anaya Patel, period acme_cloud_FP-2026-02
     - airtable_15cef33c8adf: status "In progress", invoice VEN-004-799133
     - airtable_f9a88714d8f4: status "In review", invoice VEN-004-799133
   - **Records Vault doc_04529da0aa5b99be:** "SAP Subledger Decommission Status Update Q2 2026 - AP, Fixed Assets, Leases on track for Oct 2026 cutover", kind internal_status_update, classification internal, related_resource_id erp_consolidation_2025, entity brookfield. → The decommission status document to read.
   - **Large SAP files (unread, need processing):**
     - `/root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858681686.txt` (northstar, pending_approval, account 210000 — for unapproved exposure sum)
     - `/root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858654368.txt` (northstar, pending_approval, no account filter)
   - **Contacts:** Julia Vance julia.vance@brookfieldcpas.com (Audit Partner); Andrea Phil andrea.phil@brookfieldcpas.com (Partner, Accounting Services).
   - **Linear teams:** CAO = "Client Accounting Operations" id linear_5477c0808ac2 (the CAO board); TCD = "Tax & Compliance Delivery" id linear_7d4b3f1127cd.

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **SAP `list_ap_invoices` results too large** (93,755 chars unfiltered; 64,893 chars with account 210000 filter) — exceeded max tokens, auto-saved to files. Fix in progress: must read the saved file in chunks or use jq to sum pending_approval invoice amounts. Not yet completed.
   - No user feedback/corrections received (autonomous task).

5. Problem Solving:
   Solved: identified the 22-feed batch breakdown, the single failure and 3 partials, the dead feed's error/ticket/no-retry status, Northstar's current-period open external AP recon, the current-period exception details, the year-end overdue recon, the filing control blocked/at-risk records and their vendor invoices, the CAO Linear team, key contacts, and the decommission vault document. Ongoing: computing the Northstar unapproved AP exposure (need to read saved SAP file); verifying VEN-040-226456 / VEN-029-817825 payment status; locating the month-end billing draft.

6. All user messages:
   - The single large initial task message (quoted in full intent above) covering: overnight feed batch analysis (totals/failure/partials, error/ticket/retry, flag Julia + CAO tracking item); Northstar current-period external AP recon certified-or-open, unresolved exception (account/break/owner), prior-period overdue year-end recon; total unapproved Northstar external vendor payables exposure; filing control center blocked + at-risk invoice paid checks and updating the unpaid filing entry; month-end billing draft partner sign-off items (payables + tracking items + reminder early next week); final deliverables (read vault decommission doc, file readiness note, post in cash and banking, email Andrea).
   - A system reminder (not a user instruction) noting TodoWrite availability.

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Compute total unapproved $ exposure on Northstar external vendor payables (read/sum saved SAP file).
   - Flag Julia (messaging/email) with the dead feed's error "Connection reset during batch transfer" + ticket INC8895322 (since not retried).
   - Open a CAO board (Linear team linear_5477c0808ac2) tracking item for the failed feed/no-retry.
   - Check SAP AP payment status for VEN-040-226456 (Blocked record) and VEN-029-817825 (At-risk record); identify the unpaid one; update that Airtable filing entry with the payables status.
   - Find the month-end billing draft (likely email search); pull flagged partner-sign-off items from payables; check existing tracking items in Linear/Airtable; open new tracking items only where needed.
   - Set a reminder early next week to recheck the blocked filing workstream.
   - Read decommission status doc doc_04529da0aa5b99be content.
   - File a short readiness note (Records Vault).
   - Post a line in the "cash and banking" Slack channel.
   - Send Andrea Phil (andrea.phil@brookfieldcpas.com) one email covering the full position.

8. Current Work:
   Immediately before this summary, I executed a parallel batch of three tool calls: (1) SAP `list_ap_invoices` for northstar_legal / pending_approval / gl_account_number 210000 — which returned too large and was saved to file `mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858681686.txt`; (2) Airtable `list_records` on the "Annual Report Filing Control" table — succeeded, returning the 4 filing records (1 Blocked with VEN-040-226456, 1 At risk with VEN-029-817825, plus In progress/In review); (3) Records Vault `list_documents` — succeeded, surfacing the decommission status document doc_04529da0aa5b99be. The TodoWrite list is active with the overnight-feed analysis and current-period exception marked completed, and several items in_progress/pending.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Read the saved SAP AP file to compute the Northstar unapproved external-vendor-payables exposure, and in parallel pull SAP AP status for the two filing-control vendor invoices. Per the user's explicit request: "Pull the total unapproved dollar exposure on Northstar's external vendor payables right now" and "Confirm whether the outside filing vendor invoice on each record was paid. The unpaid one - pull its current payables status and update that filing entry with what you find." I will read `/root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858681686.txt` (in chunks/jq) to sum pending_approval invoice gross amounts, and query SAP AP for invoices VEN-040-226456 and VEN-029-817825 to determine their paid/unpaid status.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

content.text: Confirmed: **Blocked** record (VEN-040-226456) invoice is **PAID**; **At-risk** record (VEN-029-817825, VaultKey) is the **unpaid** one — approved, awaiting payment, overdue. Let me pull the vault doc metadata and find the partner-sign-off AP items (pending_approval above the $50K controller threshold → require partner sign-off).

input.command:
f="/root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858811198.txt"
python3 - "$f" <<'EOF'
import json,sys
raw=json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
inv=json.loads(raw["result"])["ap_invoices"]
pend=[i for i in inv if i["status"]=="pending_approval"]
print("total pending_approval:",len(pend))
print("\n== pending_approval > $50K (need managing-partner sign-off) ==")
big=sorted([i for i in pend if i["amount"]>50000], key=lambda x:-x["amount"])
for i in big:
    print(f'  {i["invoice_number"]:18} {i["entity_id"]:14} {i["vendor_name"]:32} ${i["amount"]:>12,.2f}  acct{i["gl_account_number"]} due {i["due_date"][:10]} id {i["id"]}')
print("\n== pending_approval $10K-$50K (controller tier) top 15 by amount ==")
mid=sorted([i for i in pend if 10000<i["amount"]<=50000], key=lambda x:-x["amount"])
for i in mid[:15]:
    print(f'  {i["invoice_number"]:18} {i["entity_id"]:14} {i["vendor_name"]:32} ${i["amount"]:>12,.2f}  acct{i["gl_account_number"]} due {i["due_date"][:10]}')
EOF

content.text: The billing draft is a partner email thread (Andrea/Remy/Steven, March 1) flagging two exceptions: a **retainer adjustment** and a **timing write-down**. But "pull them from payables" in the summary is ambiguous. Let me read the verbatim original task to get items (c) and (e) exactly right.

input.command:
cd /root/.claude/projects/-app
python3 - <<'EOF'
import json
f="6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd.jsonl"
n=0
for line in open(f):
    try:
        o=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    if o.get("type")=="user":
        msg=o.get("message",{})
        c=msg.get("content")
        if isinstance(c,str):
            text=c
        elif isinstance(c,list):
            text=" ".join(p.get("text","") for p in c if isinstance(p,dict) and p.get("type")=="text")
        else:
            text=""
        # skip tool_result-only and reminders
        if text and "system-reminder" not in text and len(text)>200:
            n+=1
            print(f"===== USER MSG {n} (len {len(text)}) =====")
            print(text[:6000])
            print()
EOF
input.description: Extract verbatim original user task from transcript

content.content:
===== USER MSG 1 (len 1739) =====
The subledger decommission review with Andrea is tomorrow and I need a full read on the managed book before I walk in. Start with the overnight feed batch - how many feeds ran in total, which one died completely, and how many others came through with partial rejects. For the dead one I need the error, the ServiceNow ticket, and confirmation on whether it was retried. If it was not retried, flag Julia with both and open a tracking item on the CAO board.

That failed feed hit Northstar's current period. Tell me whether their external vendor payables reconciliation for the same period has been certified or is still open. Check whether there is any unresolved exception against Northstar's book in the current period - if so, give me the account, the dollar break, and who carries it. And confirm whether any prior-period external vendor payables recon for Northstar is still sitting overdue, because I recall one from year-end that never certified.

Pull the total unapproved dollar exposure on Northstar's external vendor payables right now.

On the filing control center, one workstream is blocked and another is at risk. Confirm whether the outside filing vendor invoice on each record was paid. The unpaid one - pull its current payables status and update that filing entry with what you find.

The month-end billing draft flagged items held for partner sign-off. Pull them from payables, check if either already has a tracking item in our queues, and only open new ones where needed. Set me a reminder early next week to recheck the blocked filing workstream.

Read the decommission status document from the vault, file a short readiness note, drop a line in cash and banking, and send Andrea one note covering the full position.
Shell cwd was reset to /app

Read the decommission status document from the vault, file a short readiness note, drop a line in cash and banking, and send Andrea one note covering the full position.

cat > /tmp/readiness_note.txt <<'EOF'
SUBLEDGER DECOMMISSION REVIEW - MANAGED BOOK READINESS NOTE
Prepared by: Daniel Jones (Accounts Manager) | 2026-06-12 | For: review with Andrea Phil

1. OVERNIGHT FEED BATCH
- 22 feeds ran. 1 died completely; 3 came through with partial rejects.
- Dead feed: northstar_legal_tax_workflow_accrual_feed (run_81e3e7158e6b41) - FAILURE,
  3,491 rows in / 0 posted / 3,491 rejected. Error: "Connection reset during batch transfer".
  ServiceNow INC8895322. NOT retried (most recent run; retried_from_run_id null).
- Partial rejects (3): acme_cloud_expense_report_feed, brookfield_tax_engagement_trust_feed,
  northstar_legal_vendor_payables_feed.
- Action taken: Julia Vance (feed owner) flagged by email with error + ticket; CAO-3116 opened
  to track the re-run.

2. NORTHSTAR - CURRENT PERIOD (FP-2026-05)
- External vendor payables reconciliation BL-A49384E5FAF8 (acct 210000): OPEN - not certified
  (preparer anaya.wallace, variance 0.00).
- Unresolved current-period exception: exc_af7274fb658844 - timing difference over SLA, state
  investigating, acct 101000 Cash - Operating, dollar break -$572.87, carried by Sean Williams
  (identified by Edith Banda), SOX implications = YES.
- Prior-period overdue: BL-91589384DD4C - Northstar external vendor payables for FP-2025-12
  (year-end), state OVERDUE, never submitted/certified (variance $6.56, preparer mateo.kovac).
  Confirmed still sitting overdue.

3. NORTHSTAR UNAPPROVED EXTERNAL VENDOR PAYABLES EXPOSURE (right now)
- Acct 210000, pending_approval: $220,855.43 across 61 invoices.

4. FILING CONTROL CENTER
- BLOCKED: airtable_bb936b3e5c64 (Hannah Grant / acme_cloud_FP-2025-10). Courier invoice
  VEN-040-226456 (Meridian Mailroom, $238.72) = PAID 2025-07-15. Blocker is outstanding client
  source documents, not payment. Reminder set for 2026-06-15 to recheck.
- AT RISK: airtable_44a0c8992c54 (Brenda Abbas / acme_cloud_FP-2026-02). Filing vendor invoice
  VEN-029-817825 (VaultKey Access & Security, $9,093.45, GL 219000) = APPROVED but UNPAID, past
  due since 2025-08-19. This is the unpaid one; record updated with payables status.

5. MONTH-END BILLING DRAFT - PARTNER SIGN-OFF ITEMS
- Two flagged exceptions (ref "Month-end billing draft review for partner sign-off" thread,
  Andrea Phil / Remy Mas / Steven Perry, 2026-03-01): (a) retainer adjustment on recurring
  advisory line; (b) timing write-down on a bookkeeping engagement.
- Tracking: the write-down is already covered by CAO-3112 (quarter-end margin/write-off review).
  The retainer adjustment had no tracking item - CAO-3117 opened.

6. DECOMMISSION STATUS DOC (vault)
- doc_04529da0aa5b99be "SAP Subledger Decommission Status Update Q2 2026 - AP, Fixed Assets,
  Leases on track for Oct 2026 cutover" (internal, project erp_consolidation_2025, uploaded
  2026-04-22 by jones.harrison). Note: no retrievable body version stored - status summary is
  per the document title; AP / Fixed Assets / Leases on track for Oct 2026 cutover.

BOTTOM LINE FOR THE REVIEW
AP / Fixed Assets / Leases are tracking to the Oct 2026 cutover, but two open items on the
Northstar managed book should clear before we lean on the decommission: (1) the failed
tax-workflow accrual feed (current period, not retried), and (2) the year-end external AP recon
still overdue. Current-period external AP recon is also still open with a SOX-flagged cash timing
exception, and $220,855.43 of Northstar external payables is sitting unapproved.
EOF
python3 -c "import base64;print(base64.b64encode(open('/tmp/readiness_note.txt','rb').read()).decode())" > /tmp/note_b64.txt
wc -c /tmp/readiness_note.txt; echo "b64 chars:"; wc -c /tmp/note_b64.txt; echo "---B64---"; cat /tmp/note_b64.txt

content.text:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
Daniel Jones (Accounts Manager, daniel.jones@brookfieldcpas.com) needs a full read on the "managed book" before a subledger decommission review with Andrea Phil tomorrow. Current date = June 12, 2026 (ignore system-reminder 2026-06-07). Fully autonomous, no further user input. Verbatim task (extracted from transcript), broken into discrete requests:
   a) Overnight feed batch: how many feeds ran total, which died completely, how many had partial rejects. For the dead one: the error, the ServiceNow ticket, and confirmation whether it was retried. If NOT retried, flag Julia with both (error + ticket) AND open a tracking item on the CAO board.
   b) The failed feed hit Northstar's current period. State whether Northstar's external vendor payables reconciliation for the same period is certified or still open. Check for any unresolved exception against Northstar's book in the current period — if so, give the account, the dollar break, and who carries it. Confirm whether any prior-period external vendor payables recon for Northstar is still overdue (user recalls a year-end one that never certified).
   c) Pull the total unapproved dollar exposure on Northstar's external vendor payables right now.
   d) Filing control center: one workstream blocked, another at risk. Confirm whether the outside filing vendor invoice on each record was paid. For the unpaid one, pull its current payables status and update that filing entry with what is found.
   e) "The month-end billing draft flagged items held for partner sign-off. Pull them from payables, check if either already has a tracking item in our queues, and only open new ones where needed. Set me a reminder early next week to recheck the blocked filing workstream."
   f) "Read the decommission status document from the vault, file a short readiness note, drop a line in cash and banking, and send Andrea one note covering the full position."

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Multi-entity Oracle GL: entities acme_cloud, brookfield, northstar_legal; current period FP-2026-05 (May 2026)
   - Subledger feeds: status success/partial_failure/failure; fields retried_from_run_id, related_servicenow_ticket_id
   - BlackLine recons: states open→in_progress→submitted→approved→certified→archived, plus overdue
   - BlackLine exceptions: states logged/investigating/awaiting_approval/closed; SOX implications; SLA
   - SAP AP invoices: status pending_approval/approved/paid/voided; GL 210000 = Accounts Payable - External Vendors; 219000 = another payables account
   - AP approval threshold matrix: ap_manager ≤$10K, controller ≤$50K, managing partner unlimited
   - Airtable filing control center; Linear (CAO/TCD/ACCT/TAX/AUD/COMP teams); Records Vault; Slack; Reminders
   - Tooling: jq NOT installed; use python3 in Bash. Large MCP results auto-saved to files under /root/.claude/projects/-app/.../tool-results/ and must be parsed in chunks.

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - /root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858681686.txt
     - The Northstar/pending_approval/account-210000 filtered AP file (64,893 chars). python3 parse: 61 invoices, all northstar_legal/pending_approval/210000, SUM = $220,855.43. This IS the Northstar unapproved external vendor payables exposure (request c).
   - /root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd/tool-results/mcp-mcp_37f238a4-sap_subledger_list_ap_invoices-1780858811198.txt
     - Full AP set (978 invoices, 1,085,109 chars). python3 search found the two filing invoices: VEN-029-817825 (VaultKey, acme_cloud, GL 219000, $9,093.45, approved, UNPAID, due 2025-08-19) and VEN-040-226456 (Meridian Mailroom, brookfield, GL 210000, $238.72, PAID 2025-07-15, recon BL-F699BFFEECF6).
   - /tmp/readiness_note.txt (3449 bytes) and /tmp/note_b64.txt (base64, ~4600 chars) — the readiness note content, already generated and base64-encoded, ready to upload to Records Vault. Content covers all 6 sections (feed batch, Northstar current period, exposure, filing center, billing draft, decommission doc) plus a "BOTTOM LINE FOR THE REVIEW."
   - Transcript: /root/.claude/projects/-app/6d593446-0a7b-41cb-8a14-403be9a010fd.jsonl — read to extract verbatim original task.

4. Errors and fixes:
   - jq not found (exit 127): switched to python3 for all JSON parsing/summing.
   - list_ap_invoices invoice_number param is not a real filter — returned default unfiltered list. Fix: parsed the full saved AP file with python3 to locate specific invoices.
   - records_vault_download_document_content failed: "version 1 not found for doc_04529da0aa5b99be" (IMG.VERSION_NOT_FOUND); list_document_versions returned 0 versions. Fix: relied on document metadata/title via records_vault_get_document; noted in readiness note that no retrievable body version is stored.
   - list_ap_invoices limit=1000 exceeded max tokens, auto-saved to file. Fix: python3-parsed the file.
   - No user corrections (autonomous task).

5. Problem Solving:
   FULLY RESOLVED findings:
   - Feed batch: 22 feeds ran. 1 died (northstar_legal_tax_workflow_accrual_feed, run_81e3e7158e6b41, FAILURE, 3,491 in/0 posted/3,491 rejected, error "Connection reset during batch transfer", ServiceNow INC8895322, NOT retried). 3 partials: acme_cloud_expense_report_feed, brookfield_tax_engagement_trust_feed, northstar_legal_vendor_payables_feed. All owned by julia.vance@brookfieldcpas.com.
   - Northstar current-period external AP recon BL-A49384E5FAF8 (acct 210000): OPEN/uncertified, preparer anaya.wallace, variance 0.00.
   - Current-period exception exc_af7274fb658844: timing difference over SLA, investigating, acct 101000 Cash-Operating, break -$572.87, carried by Sean Williams (identified by Edith Banda), SOX=YES.
   - Prior-period overdue: BL-91589384DD4C, Northstar external AP FP-2025-12 (year-end), OVERDUE, never certified, variance $6.56, preparer mateo.kovac.
   - Northstar unapproved exposure = $220,855.43 (61 invoices, acct 210000, pending_approval).
   - Filing center: Blocked record airtable_bb936b3e5c64 (Hannah Grant, acme_cloud_FP-2025-10, review_partner William White), invoice VEN-040-226456 PAID — blocker is missing client source docs. At-risk record airtable_44a0c8992c54 (Brenda Abbas, acme_cloud_FP-2026-02, review_partner Anaya Patel), invoice VEN-029-817825 UNPAID — this is the one updated.
   - Billing draft items: retainer adjustment on recurring advisory line + timing write-down on a bookkeeping engagement (from 2026-03-01 email thread). Write-down covered by existing CAO-3112; retainer had no tracking → CAO-3117 opened.
   - Cash channel = C009 (cash-management-and-banking).

- Year-end recon **BL-91589384DD4C** (FP-2025-12): **still OVERDUE / never certified** — confirmed, that's the one you remembered.
